zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Gamond於1494年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親James Gamond20歲，母親Margaret Ferrers15歲。她於大約1515年與William Yelverton III, Esq在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年7月26日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Gamond于1494年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲James Gamond20岁，母亲Margaret Ferrers15岁。她于大约1515年与William Yelverton III, Esq在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1542年7月26日在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gamond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Herve, Armand, Girard, Pierre.
French: variant of   Gaumont   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. Compare   Goman   and   Gorman  .
History: It was Robert Gaumont from France, whose surname was altered to Gaumond in North America (see   Gaumont  ).

variants.name: Gaumont
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Gautmund, composed of the elements gaut, an ethnic name meaning ‘Goth’ or ‘Geat’ (see Goss ), and mund ‘protection’. Compare Gaumond , Goman , and Gorman .

History: The progenitor of the (majority of the) American Gaumonts was Robert Gaumont/Gaumond from Charenton-le-Pont in Val-de-Marne, France, who married Louise Robin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671. His descendants mostly bear altered forms of the surname, such as Gaumond, Goman, and Gorman.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Gamond was born in 1494, in London, England, her father, James Gamond, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Ferrers, was 15. She married William Yelverton III, Esq about 1515, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 26 July 1542, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Gamond est née en 1494, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, James Gamond, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Ferrers, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Yelverton III, Esq environ 1515, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1542, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Gamond 1494 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Gamond 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Ferrers 15. Sie hat um 1515 in London, England, United Kingdom William Yelverton III, Esq geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1542 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gamond è nata il nel 1494 nel London, England, sua padre, James Gamond, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Ferrers, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William Yelverton III, Esq circa 1515, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1542, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Gamondが1494年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父James Gamondは20歳，母Margaret Ferrersは15歳であった。約1515年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでWilliam Yelverton III, Esqと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年7月26日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Gamond(이)가 1494년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Gamond(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Ferrers(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 William Yelverton III, Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 7월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Gamond nasceu em 1494, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Gamond, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Ferrers, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Yelverton III, Esq aproximadamente 1515, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1542, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Gamond родилась в 1494 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени James Gamond было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Ferrers, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Yelverton III, Esq около 1515 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 июля 1542 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Gamond nació en 1494, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, James Gamond, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Ferrers, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William Yelverton III, Esq aproximadamente 1515, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1542, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
